Genetically_modified_food.description: Level of public concern regarding genetically modified food, scored on a scale from 1 (not concerned at all) to 5 (very concerned), for 20 respondents.

Intensive_pesticide_use.description: Level of public concern regarding intensive pesticide use, scored on a scale from 1 (not concerned at all) to 5 (very concerned), for 20 respondents.
